rationale: The selected candidate (7b37f5ba) is the only one that correctly translated the frontmatter title and the entire body text. Other candidates either left the title empty or left large sections in English. The translation captures Dan's direct, insightful tone well. The previous judge's suggestion regarding 'navigating' has already been incorporated into the 'current' text provided in the prompt, so no further high-priority fixes are required.

suggestionLog.reason: The English word 'navigating' was left in the middle of a Japanese sentence; it should be translated for better flow.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
